response:
Yes we can check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server like ping but only one direction

To do this we can use a udp client and measure the time between sending the packet and receiving the response

We can use the System.Net.Sockets.UdpClient class to send and receive packets

We can measure the time taken using the DateTime.Now property

We can also use the Stopwatch class to measure the time taken

We can then compare the time taken to send the packet with the time taken to receive the response

This will give us the one way time

We can also use the Ping class to get the one way time

This is similar to ping but only one direction

We can also use the NetworkInformation class to get the one way time

This is similar to ping but only one direction

This is similar to ping but only one direction
